message:
feat: real-time settings.json overwrite detection and self-healing

When Claude Code silently overwrites ~/.claude/settings.json
mid-session (removing the DCG hook), DCG now detects the removal
and re-registers itself on the very next hook invocation.

- Added ensure_hook_registered() self-heal check in hook path
- Fail-open: errors are logged, never block command evaluation
- Fast path: one file read + JSON parse when hook is present
- Configurable: self_heal_hook = true (default), DCG_NO_SELF_HEAL=1
- Reuses existing install_dcg_hook_into_settings() infrastructure
- Added 3 unit tests for the self-heal behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
